Get Started Schedule a Demo
Our Purpose

Why This Platform Exists

After building OAuth2 and identity flows across multiple systems, it became clear that teams repeatedly re-implement the same patterns: client management, token flows, RBAC, tenant separation, and operational visibility. This project turns those repeated patterns into a reusable, modern identity platform focused on clarity, security, and real-world usability.

Core Features

Self-Hosted & Data Control

Keep identity data inside your own infrastructure and databases without depending on external providers.

Centralized Identity

Manage users, roles, tenant policies, and identity operations from one control place.

Security Standards

Built-in OAuth 2.1, OpenID Connect, RBAC, MFA, and GDPR by design help meet modern security expectations.

API Authorization

Protect APIs with scopes, token validation, and consistent access control across services.

Faster Development

Avoid building authentication from scratch and reduce delivery time for new applications.

Admin Portal

UI to manage tenants, applications, users, and security settings, with a dashboard for monitoring authentication activity.

Build vs Buy Identity Provider

Building authentication and access control systems from scratch becomes complex as applications scale. TokenIDP provides a ready-to-use identity platform so teams can focus on building product features instead of security infrastructure.

Build Authentication Yourself

Design login + OAuth flows

Build user, rbac & tenant management

Implement token management

Maintain security policies

Weeks or Months of development effort

Requires deep knowledge of standard protocols

Use TokenIDP

✓OAuth2 + OpenID Connect ready

✓Built-in user, rbac & tenant management

✓Built-in token management

✓MFA & security policies

✓Integrate in minutes

✓No deep protocol knowledge required

How It Works (High-Level Architecture)

Your application delegates authentication and authorization to the Identity Platform, while keeping full control of business logic and data. The platform issues secure tokens after login. Your backend validates these tokens and enforces access rules based on tenant and roles.

Standards-Based Authentication

TokenIDP is designed around the standards most teams need in production, so applications can integrate with clear protocol boundaries instead of custom authentication logic.

  • ✓OAuth 2.1-aligned architecture
    Designed for secure, standards-driven authorization without custom implementations.
  • ✓OpenID Connect (OIDC) identity layer
    Enables reliable authentication and user identity verification.
  • ✓Authorization Code Flow with PKCE
    Industry-recommended flow for web and mobile applications, preventing authorization code interception.
  • ✓Client Credentials Flow for machine-to-machine access
    Ideal for backend services, APIs, and microservices communication.
  • ✓Device Authorization Flow (Device Flow)
    Enables secure authentication for devices with limited input capabilities such as TVs and IoT devices.
  • ✓Secure Refresh Token handling
    Supports long-lived sessions with controlled and secure token renewal.
  • ✓Token Revocation support
    Allows clients to invalidate access or refresh tokens to immediately terminate sessions and prevent unauthorized access.

Device Flow

Admin Portal

Operate tenants, applications, users, and policy settings through a central management interface built for support teams and platform owners.

Integrate in Minutes

Developers can get started with the existing host integration patterns, the React SDK, and discovery-based configuration instead of building authentication plumbing from zero.

  • NuGet package
  • React SDK
  • OAuth discovery endpoint
services.AddTokenIDPAuthentication();
TokenIDP

TokenIDP helps teams manage authentication, authorization, tenant access, and identity operations through a standards-based platform built for modern B2B SaaS applications.
